title: Testing 67 Models: Combining LLMs Rarely Beats the Best Single Model
abstract: Testing 67 Models: Combining LLMs Rarely Beats the Best Single Model delivers solid reasoning and generation capabilities through a straightforward API. It is not another ChatGPT wrapper — the arch...
abstract_zh: 讲真，Testing 67 Models: Combining LLMs Rarely Beats the Best Single Model 这个模型值得你花时间了解一下。不是那种"又一个ChatGPT壳子"的路数，底层有真东西。API接上就能干活，不废话。
